title: List All Container Images Running in a Cluster — List Container images filtering by Pod namespace
text:
To target only pods in a specific namespace, use the namespace flag. The
following matches only Pods in the
kube-system
namespace.
kubectl get pods --namespace kube-system -o
jsonpath
=
"{.items[*].spec.containers[*].image}"

As an alternative to jsonpath, Kubectl supports using
go-templates
for formatting the output:
kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o go-template --template
=
"{{range .items}}{{range .spec.containers}}{{.image}} {{end}}{{end}}"
